summary: v104.44.32 Testing Complete - RST Duplicate Check Collection Name Fix VERIFIED. Critical bug fixed: rst_check.py was checking wrong collection names (by_product_sale_vouchers, entries) instead of actual (bp_sale_register, mill_entries). Backend now correctly returns bp_sale_register entries for RST 7. Frontend HARD BLOCK working - duplicate RST save is blocked with error toast.

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 v104.44.32 tests + 12/12 v104.44.31 regression tests passed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (RST 7 has 2 bp_sale_register + 1 vehicle_weights entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: v104.44.32 collection name fix verified. Key changes: (1) SALE_COLLECTIONS now ['sale_vouchers', 'bp_sale_register'] (was 'by_product_sale_vouchers' which doesn't exist). (2) PURCHASE_COLLECTIONS now includes 'mill_entries' (was 'entries' which is Node naming). (3) Frontend useRstCheck.jsx has COLLECTION_LABELS for both bp_sale_register and mill_entries. (4) RST 7 check returns 2 bp_sale_register + 1 VW entry. (5) HARD BLOCK works - entering RST 7 in BP Sale form shows warning and blocks save with toast '❌ RST 7 duplicate — save block hua'.

rst_check_api_bp_sale_register.details: GET /api/rst-check?rst_no=7&context=sale returns 2 bp_sale_register entries (MBOPL) + 1 vehicle_weights entry. Previously only returned VW because wrong collection name was used.

rst_check_exclude_id.details: exclude_id parameter correctly excludes bp_sale_register entry. When excluding one bp_sale entry, only the other bp_sale + VW is returned.

next_rst_includes_bp_sale_register.details: GET /api/rst-check/next-rst?kms_year=2026-2027 returns 77778, indicating bp_sale_register is included in max scan.

frontend_rst_warning_display.details: Entering RST 7 in BP Sale form shows 3 warnings: 2 for By-Product Sale (MBOPL) and 1 for Vehicle Weight (Dispatch(Sale)).

frontend_hard_block_on_save.details: Clicking Save Sale with duplicate RST 7 shows error toast '❌ RST 7 duplicate — save block hua' and form stays open. No new entry created in DB (count remained 5).

regression_v104_44_31.details: All 12 tests from v104.44.31 pass (RST check, Transit Pass Register, Next RST/TP endpoints).

test_classes: TestRstCheckV104_44_32 (6 tests) - Collection name fix verification

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: BP Sale (Rice Bran) me RST 7 enter kiya bina warning save ho gaya jabki DB me already 2 BP sales aur 1 VW Dispatch entry hai RST 7 ke liye
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: rst_check.py was checking wrong collection names: 'by_product_sale_vouchers' (doesn't exist) instead of 'bp_sale_register', and 'entries' (Node naming) instead of 'mill_entries' (Python naming)
bug_fix_verification.verification: RST 7 check now returns 2 bp_sale_register + 1 VW entry. Frontend HARD BLOCK prevents save with error toast.
